meta.definition: Entry, policy, programme, and exact-window coverage are counted separately. Predictions never count as verified deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Early Fall 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central timeline is approximate; use each programme page for an exact deadline.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central application opening is announced, while deadlines remain programme-specific.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Guidance expected mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Oxford says guidance for applications made in 2026-27 will be available from mid-September 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The degree programme application becomes available in September; no exact day is stated.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications open; deadlines vary by course
cycleGuidance.notes: Cambridge's directory is open for 2026/27, but each course has its own deadline and may close early.

universities.school: ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology)

cycleGuidance.notes: The applicable window depends on the country of the applicant's Bachelor's degree and scholarship/direct-doctorate status.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Check each course; many are currently open
cycleGuidance.notes: Admissions take place throughout the year, with visa-specific deadlines on individual course pages.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Generally 21 Nov–15 Dec
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page gives a recurring month/day range without an explicit application-cycle year, so no exact calendar record is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Check each programme page
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc Computer Science page publishes main and clearing deadlines but does not expose an exact application opening date, so no complete calendar window is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Dates vary by programme
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence lists a 1 November to 31 March period for the August 2026 intake.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application is open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MS in Applied Data Science lists several exact deadlines through 23 June 2026, but its page does not state the exact opening date required for a complete calendar window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 20 October to 23 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The standard international route is closed; English-taught master's programmes may have different deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 September 2025 to 1 February 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Penn Engineering's regular master's window is shared across its on-campus master's programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central application generally reopens in early September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Cornell gives only an approximate central opening. The Computer Science MEng publishes recurring February 1 and October 1 deadlines without an exact opening day for each intake.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Programme-specific rounds within the September 2025 to February 2026 cycle
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing programme published an exact second-round window from 1 January to 27 February 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact dates not yet published
cycleGuidance.notes: The EECS MEng page still displays the closed Fall 2026 cycle and its 14 January 2026 deadline, but does not state the exact opening day.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications can be submitted before each course closing date
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Information Technology lists 30 November 2026 for the February 2027 intake and 31 May 2027 for the July 2027 intake, but no exact opening day.

universities.school: The University of New South Wales

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications are accepted through the relevant UNSW or UAC portal
cycleGuidance.notes: The published 2026 term table gives closing dates but not a precise opening day, and the Master of Information Technology is subject to grouped offer rounds and capacity.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The exact opening day is not yet published. Yale lists 2 January 2027 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern time as the Computer Science MS deadline.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Mid-November to 15 December, or 16 December to 31 March
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states recurring month/day periods without binding them to a calendar year, so no exact calendar window is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Informatics MSc: 1 February–31 May for winter; 1 October–30 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes stable month/day periods without an explicit cycle year, so they are retained as recurring guidance rather than exact calendar records.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications accepted year-round
cycleGuidance.notes: The tracked Engineering for Professionals Computer Science MS accepts applications at any time and therefore has no finite application window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The exact Fall 2027 opening day and Computer Science deadline are not yet published. The current Computer Science page still shows 15 December 2025 for Fall 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Generally two years before the semester start date
cycleGuidance.notes: Standard postgraduate closing rules are 31 January or 15 July for domestic applicants and 18 December or 29 May for international applicants. Exact course pages take precedence.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Computer Science MSc opens 15 September
cycleGuidance.notes: The thesis MSc lists 15 December for international applicants and 15 February for domestic applicants. The non-thesis MSc lists 15 December for both, but the page does not bind these dates to a calendar year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 January–24 February or 17 February–16 March 2026 for the main platform groups
cycleGuidance.notes: The tracked Master Informatique is listed under the Mon Master route for eligible profiles, with an exact 17 February to 16 March 2026 window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: October 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Computer Science states that Fall 2027 applications will open in October 2026, but the exact opening day and deadline are not yet published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 13 October–12 December 2025 and 1–31 March 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The official English-taught postgraduate admissions brochure publishes two complete application phases for international applicants.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications usually open in mid-October for the following September
cycleGuidance.notes: The Advanced Computing MSc is currently marked open, but the official guidance does not expose an exact opening day and its accessible course content does not state a finite closing date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 2027 direct applications are currently open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Domestic direct applications close 13 February or 17 July 2027. International applications generally close 15 December 2026 or 15 May 2027, with earlier programme exceptions.

universities.school: The Chinese University of Hong Kong

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications commenced 1 September 2025 at 09:00 Hong Kong time
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Computer Science closed on 31 January 2026. Other CUHK taught programmes use different rounds and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications usually open in October 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MSc is closed for September 2026 and lists a 31 March 2026 deadline. The exact next-cycle opening day and deadline are not yet published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Advanced Computer Science lists 7 November 2025, 2 January 2026, 27 February 2026, and 22 May 2026 selection deadlines. Later applications depend on availability.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Direct applications are available; exact opening and closing dates are not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Artificial Intelligence lists February and July starts and links both intakes to the direct application route, without publishing a complete dated window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 29 May-4 June 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The IST application page gives a complete summer application period. The Computer Science guide states that its master's programme does not accept winter-examination applications.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MS FAQ lists January 15 as the fall priority deadline, February 15 as the fall final deadline, and October 15 as the spring deadline, without identifying the cycle year or opening day.
The official Spring 2027 international graduate guide gives a complete online application and document-upload period in Korea Standard Time.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Next exact dates are not configured; previous cycle deadline was 15 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The current central MSc page says upcoming intake dates are not yet configured. The department records 15 December 2025 for September 2026 or January 2027 starts, so a similar mid-December deadline is only a low-confidence prior-cycle reference.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 29 October 2025-28 May 2026 across three sessions
cycleGuidance.notes: The first two IP Paris portal sessions are common dated windows. The third session ran 27 March-28 May 2026 but is not represented as a general window because some programmes did not open for it.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications opened 29 September 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The CS page lists review milestones on 30 November, 31 December, and 28 February, followed by rolling review language. It does not state one unambiguous final closing date for the MS application.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: For the Master of Data Science, international deadlines are 30 November 2026 for Semester 1 and 31 May 2027 for Semester 2. Domestic deadlines are 31 January and 30 June 2027.

universities.school: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Information Technology lists three deadlines for local and non-local applicants: 1 November 2025, 1 January 2026, and 1 March 2026. The page describes admissions as rolling.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Expected around mid-September 2026; exact next-cycle date not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The current page says applications reopen in mid-September and the master's deadline is 15 January. A similar September 2026-January 2027 period is only a prior-cycle reference until the new cycle is dated explicitly.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Usually mid-September; exact next-cycle opening day not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The CS FAQ states that applications are submitted between mid-September and 15 December. The next cycle should be treated as a prior-cycle reference until exact dated guidance is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications open 15 October
cycleGuidance.notes: Computer Science is in the selected-programme group with a 15 January deadline for non-EU/EFTA applicants. EU/EFTA applicants use the 1 April deadline. The page does not label these dates with a cycle year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications opened 15 October 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The official guide lists scholarship deadlines on 15 December 2025, 15 February 2026, and 31 March 2026, with self-supported applications closing 31 May 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact next-cycle dates not published
cycleGuidance.notes: The international admissions listing should be monitored for the next annual postgraduate guide. No complete 2027 application period is currently published.
The official international-student schedule gives a complete application period for Fall 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications have been allocated continuously since September 2025; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science conversion MSc closes on 27 August 2026 for overseas applicants and 21 September 2026 for home applicants, subject to earlier closure if full.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 9 September to 9 December 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Most SCS graduate programmes have an 18 November early deadline and a 9 December final deadline. MHCI and several MSE routes have stated exceptions.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The joint Computer Science master's lists 1 June for Dutch-prior-education and EU/EEA applicants on the UvA page. VU publishes applicant-specific procedures for other international degrees.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 2 July 2025 to 30 April 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc in Information Technology had early and main deadlines on 15 October 2025 and 15 January 2026, followed by an extended deadline on 30 April 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: Tandon lists 1 December for fall priority consideration and 15 March as the extended final on-campus MS deadline. Computer Science MS does not accept spring applications.

universities.school: London School of Economics and Political Science (LSE)

cycleGuidance.opensText: Open; exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The MSc Data Science page says applications are open and considered on a rolling basis with no fixed deadline. Separate funding deadlines apply.
The Informatics guide gives a postal submission period of 5-19 June 2026; in-person submission is accepted on 19 June only.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 April-15 May for winter; 2 October-15 November for summer
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page publishes recurring strict deadlines without attaching a year, so these remain guidance rather than a cycle-specific formal window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 9 February to 30 August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central calendar covers Malaysian and international applicants to coursework and mixed-mode master's and doctoral programmes.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use the official application-window tool
cycleGuidance.notes: The tool confirms that academic year 2026/27 starts on 16 September 2026, but a single deadline cannot be generalized across nationalities and programmes.
Online applications closed on 13 March, while supporting documents were accepted until 17 March 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications will open in August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MS deadline is 2 February, but Duke has not published the exact August opening day for the 2027 cycle.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact next-cycle dates not verified
cycleGuidance.notes: Keep the programme page under monitoring and use a targeted alternate runner if the cloud-IP challenge persists.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 October-13 November 2025 and 1 December 2025-15 January 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The international admissions page publishes two complete September-entry rounds.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Exact opening day not stated
cycleGuidance.notes: The Master of Data Science page lists 8 December 2025 for Semester One 2026 and 8 June 2026 for Semester Two 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 3 September to 23 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The department states that Fall 2026 applications opened on 3 September 2025 and closed at 5:00 p.m. PST on 23 December 2025 after an extension.

universities.school: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals

cycleGuidance.opensText: Start application from the official Apply page
cycleGuidance.notes: The listing asks applicants to note the upcoming cycle and start the application, but does not publish an opening and closing date pair.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 15 October to 15 December
cycleGuidance.notes: The page lists an application opening on 15 October and deadline on 15 December, plus a recommendation deadline on 20 December, but does not attach a year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: 1 September 2025 to 23 January 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The CS master's page states that Fall 2026 applications were accepted from 1 September 2025 until the 23 January 2026 deadline.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Use Mon Master calendar or programme-specific INCEPTION dates
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states that INCEPTION opening dates are specific to each programme and shown in each programme's application section.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Computer Science MS deadline: 1 December
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MS is fall-only with a recurring 1 December deadline at 11:59 p.m. U.S. Central Time. No exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Closed for applications
cycleGuidance.notes: The Machine Learning, Systems and Control programme starts on 31 August 2026 and is marked closed. Exact application dates are not displayed on the current programme page.

universities.school: Sorbonne University (merged from Paris IV & UPMC)

cycleGuidance.opensText: Campus France applications: October to December
cycleGuidance.notes: The page gives only a month range for Campus France applicants and directs other applicants to Mon Master or eCandidat, so no general exact window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Open now; on-time deadline 2 August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Late applications may still be accepted, but Warwick cannot guarantee timely processing. The page does not state the exact date applications opened.

universities.school: Trinity College Dublin, The University of Dublin

cycleGuidance.opensText: Closing date 30 January 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page lists a 30 January 2026 closing date for the one-year full-time MSc but no exact application opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September start deadline 28 August 2026; January start 18 December 2026; closes when full
cycleGuidance.notes: The page states UK/non-visa deadlines of 28 August 2026 (September start) and 18 December 2026 (January start) and that applications close as soon as the programme is full. No exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Beginning-of-year and mid-year intakes; apply via UWA online application
cycleGuidance.notes: The handbook lists beginning-of-year and mid-year commencement but no exact application opening or closing dates; coursework applications are assessed on a rolling basis.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Opens 16 October 2026; last day to apply 15 January 2027
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page states the Autumn 2027 round opens 16 October 2026 with 15 January 2027 as the last day to apply (documents/fee by 1 February, results 1 April). The complete opening-closing pair is recorded as an official future window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: International/EU staged rounds Oct 2025 to Jul 2026; Home deadline 21 August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: International and EU applicants apply in six recorded rounds running from 1 October 2025 to 8 July 2026; home applicants have a 21 August 2026 deadline without a published opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Winter semester 1 August to 15 September (previous year); summer semester 1 February to 15 March
cycleGuidance.notes: For access- and admission-restricted master's programmes the page lists application periods of 1 August to 15 September (of the previous year) and 1 February to 15 March, applying equally to German and international applicants. No cycle year is attached, so no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications are taken three times annually; deadlines are July 1, November 1, and February 1
cycleGuidance.notes: For winter 2027 the page extends the November 1 deadline to Monday, 2 November. No exact opening date is stated, so no complete window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications for international students are open now for 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The page lists February and July starts and says international applications are open now, but no exact application opening and closing dates are provided.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Fall full-consideration deadline December 20; final fall cutoff April 15; spring deadline August 31
cycleGuidance.notes: The one-year CSE Master of Engineering deadline is March 15. The page does not state exact application opening dates, so no complete window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: New entrant registration 6-11 August 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page states that 2026 registration has closed and publishes a tentative admission schedule; applicants with already approved leveling courses used 30 July-5 August 2025, while new entrants used 6-11 August 2025.

cycleGuidance.opensText: IGP(B) and IGP(C) application period 14 January-5 April 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: Science Tokyo published separate IGP(B) and IGP(C) calls for Fall 2026 with the same application period; IGP(C) is recorded as the representative formal window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: International applicant deadline 11 September 2026; apply as early as possible
cycleGuidance.notes: The official course page lists September 2026 as the start date and 11 September 2026 for international applicants, while directing applicants to apply early. No exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: International deadline 19 August 2026; UK deadline 2 September 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science MSc page lists a September 2026 start, an international deadline of 19 August 2026 at midday UK time, and a UK deadline of 2 September 2026 at midday UK time. No exact opening date is stated.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Priority deadline 15 January 2026; regular deadline 15 March 2026; late review continued after 15 March
cycleGuidance.notes: The GRS MA/MS deadlines page lists Computer Science MS priority and regular deadlines of 15 January and 15 March for Fall 2026 and says applications received after 15 March continue to be reviewed. No exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Consecutive master applications open 20 April 2026; limited-admission deadline 31 May 2026; unrestricted-admission deadline 15 August 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The official deadline page gives 20 April to 31 May 2026 for limited-admission consecutive master programmes and 20 April to 15 August 2026 for unrestricted programmes. The Data Science page states the programme starts in winter semester and that admission status is determined each semester.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Spring 2026 deadline 1 October 2025; Fall 2026 deadline 1 December 2025
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science application steps page lists deadlines of 1 October 2025 for Spring 2026 and 1 December 2025 for Fall 2026, and states Fall 2026 applications are no longer being accepted. No exact opening date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Special Selection in Summer for International Applicants main application acceptance period 22-26 June 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The 2027 application guide page links the official PDF for April 2027 master course admissions. The PDF states a pre-application screening period of 25-29 May 2026 and a main application acceptance period of 22-26 June 2026 for Special Selection in Summer for International Applicants.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Apply now for 2026 entry; no staged admissions process
cycleGuidance.notes: The course page lists September 2026 entry and says applicants can apply through the usual postgraduate online form. It does not publish a final deadline or exact opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application deadline 15 January 2026; application code UU-M1160
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page lists the study period from 31 August 2026 to 4 June 2028 and an application deadline of 15 January 2026. It links to University Admissions for application but does not show an opening date on the programme page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September 2026 start; apply through Durham postgraduate application portal
cycleGuidance.notes: The official course page lists the MSc, department, and September 2026 start and links to the postgraduate application portal, but no exact application opening or closing date is published.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Apply via Computing Science applications and admissions page
cycleGuidance.notes: The official Computing Science page confirms M.Sc. graduate options and links to Apply Now, but exact opening and closing dates were not available from the accessible programme overview captured for this batch.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Domestic postgraduate Autumn 2027 applications open 28 July 2026 and close 31 January 2027; international most-course deadlines are session-based
cycleGuidance.notes: The central dates page states domestic postgraduate Autumn 2027 applications open on 28 July 2026 and close on 31 January 2027. It separately lists international postgraduate closing dates for most courses by session without giving matching opening dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Fall master applications 1 January-30 April; visa-requiring applicants 1 January-28 February; spring master applications 1 July-30 November; visa-requiring applicants 1-31 July
cycleGuidance.notes: The page publishes recurring application windows by semester and applicant visa status, but it does not attach a cycle year to the ranges. No formal dated application record is created from these recurring windows.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September start: EU/EEA/Swiss opens 16 January and closes 1 March; non-EU opens 15 November and closes 15 January. February legal-right route opens 15 August and closes 15 October.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official programme page lists the opening dates, deadlines, and reply dates, and also shows Computer Science 2026 admission statistics. Because the application-date rows do not attach a calendar year to each opening date, no formal dated window is recorded.

universities.school: Pohang University of Science And Technology (POSTECH)

cycleGuidance.opensText: General admission first round application period 24 February-3 April 2026, 18:00 KST
cycleGuidance.notes: The POSTECH graduate admissions homepage states the 2026-27 general admissions first round application period and directs applicants to the graduate admissions application menu.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September start opens 1 October; scholarship deadline 1 February; non-EU deadline 1 April; EU deadline 1 June. February start opens 1 July; non-EU deadline 1 September; EU deadline 15 October.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official non-Dutch-degree page lists these dates and states deadlines expire at 23:59 CET/CEST. Because no cycle year is attached, no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Autumn 2026 portal opens 1 December and national/EU/EEA deadline is 1 March 2026; Spring 2027 national/EU/EEA deadline is 15 October 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The central MSc page states the Autumn 2026 opening and national/EU/EEA deadline changes. It also states the Spring 2027 national/EU/EEA deadline and that non-EU deadlines are unchanged but must be checked under the detailed deadline pages.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should follow the programme admission-process instructions
cycleGuidance.notes: The official IME page confirms the graduate Computer Science programme and directs applicants to the admission process page, but no exact opening or closing date was captured from the English page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application qualifications, procedures, and application periods vary depending on each graduate school
cycleGuidance.notes: The central page confirms graduate admission routes and explicitly says applicants should contact their desired graduate school for detailed information. No general computing-specific window is recorded from the central page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Traditional CS MS/PhD fall-only application deadline December 15
cycleGuidance.notes: The page states the traditional CS MS/PhD programme is fall-only with a December 15 application deadline. No cycle year or exact opening date is shown.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Graduate online admission opened 1 December 2025 and closed 25 February 2026
cycleGuidance.notes: The Fall 2026 application timeline lists the opening date, closing date, document deadline, decision timing, and start of classes for graduate admission.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Deadline 6 August 2026 for September entry; 11 December 2026 for January 2027 entry
cycleGuidance.notes: The official course page lists both application deadlines and entry points, but does not state the exact application opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Autumn 2026 applications ran 1 December 2025 to 2 January 2026; Autumn 2027 announced for 7 December 2026 to 5 January 2027
cycleGuidance.notes: The central page gives the full Autumn 2026 master's application period and announces the planned Autumn 2027 period. The Computer Science page also lists 1 December 2025 to 2 January 2026.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application period begins 5 January 2027 at 08:00 and ends 19 January 2027 at 15:00
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page states the exact application period and notes that there is only one intake per academic year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: September start deadlines: 1 April for visa or residence-permit applicants, 15 May for applicants not needing a visa or residence permit. February start deadlines: 15 October and 15 November respectively.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page states deadlines expire at 23:59 CET and advises applying early, but it does not publish opening dates for the cycle.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications generally open on or around September 1; exact deadlines are set by the programme or department.
cycleGuidance.notes: The central official page is reliable for the process model but not enough to create a Computer Science-specific dated window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Norway/Nordic August start opens 1 February and closes 15 April for most programmes; non-EU/EEA/Swiss applicants open 15 October and close 1 December for August start; EU/EEA/Swiss August start opens 1 February and closes 1 March.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official central page gives the relevant recurring portal openings and deadlines by applicant category. No formal dated window is recorded because the page does not attach a year to the date ranges.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Deadlines are 1 December for September admission, 1 June for January admission, and 1 October for May admission.
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page confirms the MMath, admit terms, and deadlines. No application opening dates or cycle years are published on the captured page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application deadline is 1 February for admission to the following fall semester.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official MSCS page gives the annual fall-only deadline but no exact opening date or cycle year.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should follow the official PG admissions page and relevant department/programme notices.
cycleGuidance.notes: The current official page is a reliable entry point but did not expose a current complete computing master's application window in this environment.

cycleGuidance.opensText: International Semester 2 2026 pages list postgraduate application deadlines by qualification; local Semester 2 2026 applications opened 10 March 2026 and most courses remain open until filled.
cycleGuidance.notes: Because the captured pages combine broad qualification deadlines, rolling local admission, and course-specific exceptions, no formal programme-specific dated window is recorded yet.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should use the course catalogue enrolment section and Sapienza admissions procedures for exact dates.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official catalogue page confirms the programme and access procedure, but the accessible text did not provide opening and closing dates for the admission cycle.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Last date to apply online without late fine is 10 April 2026.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official Academic Office page confirms the 2026-27 M.Tech. admissions cycle and deadline. No formal dated application window is recorded because the opening date was not captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Summer intake opens around 1 November; deadline is 15 January for non-EU applicants and 1 March for EU applicants. Winter intake opens in August 2026; deadline is 15 September for non-EU applicants and 15 October for EU applicants.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official deadlines page provides applicant-category deadlines and one exact/approximate opening description, but the summer opening is approximate and not cycle-year-specific, so no formal window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The course page has an active Apply to Bath link for September 2026 entry.
cycleGuidance.notes: No closing date or exact application window was captured from the official course page.

universities.school: University of Science and Technology of China

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should follow UPM postgraduate how-to-apply and programme pages for exact dates.
cycleGuidance.notes: The captured official page confirms programme availability but did not expose a current application window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should use the USM postgraduate admission portal for application timing.
cycleGuidance.notes: The captured official programme page lists the programmes and Apply Now link, but no opening or closing dates were captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The course page shows September 2026 entry and an Apply Online route.
cycleGuidance.notes: Funding deadlines may be earlier, but no course application closing date was captured.

universities.school: Alma Mater Studiorum - University of Bologna

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should use the Admission section on the official course site for exact enrolment calls.
cycleGuidance.notes: The captured accessible text confirmed the programme but exposed notice-board scholarship deadlines rather than admission-window dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The admission-and-enrollment page states the information applies to 2026-2027 applications, but exact deadlines are produced through an interactive applicant flow.
cycleGuidance.notes: No complete static application window was captured from the official pages.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application Deadline (EEA) 1 May
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme page summary gives the EEA deadline and September start date, but no cycle year or opening date was captured.

universities.school: University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applications typically open in early August; Graduate School funding consideration date is 16 December 2025; no additional fall residential applications accepted after 9 June.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official deadline page provides central constraints, but programme-specific Computer Science deadlines must be checked separately before creating a formal dated window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should refer to the programme website and GraduateCAS process for exact deadlines.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official MSCS page confirms the programme and application route, but no exact opening or closing date was captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Summer 2026 master's: restricted 1 December 2025-15 January 2026; open admission 1 December 2025-28 February 2026. Winter 2026/2027 master's: German-language restricted 1 April-15 June 2026; English-language restricted 1 April-15 May 2026; open admission 1 June-31 August 2026.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official dates page gives complete central windows, but the target programme's admission type must be confirmed before formal programme windows are created.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Spring general deadline 15 September; fall scholarship consideration deadline 15 December and final deadline 15 January.
cycleGuidance.notes: No cycle years or opening dates were captured, so no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Dutch, EU/EEA, and non-EU/EEA applicants: deadline 1 May 2027 for 1 September 2027 start.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page states applications are evaluated on a continuous basis and applicants do not have to wait until the deadline, but it does not provide an exact opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: UK students apply by 11 September 2026; international students apply by 21 August 2026; course starts 28 September 2026.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official course page gives closing dates by applicant category but not the application opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: For Masters by Coursework and Dissertation, applications open April and close 30 September; applications for 2026 are now open and close 30 September 2025.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page gives opening month and closing date, but not the exact opening day. The Masters by Dissertation route has no opening or closing dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Domestic applicants: 31 July; international applicants: 15 February. The department accepts new MSc students in the fall September term only.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page gives closing dates but not a cycle year or exact application opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The programme page links to a selection procedure and the central master admissions page lists Computer Science as an English master with AV selection procedure.
cycleGuidance.notes: No complete application-period dates were captured from the accessible official pages in this pass.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official postgraduate admission page exposes programme categories and application route but not exact intake opening or closing dates in the accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: Keep monitoring UTM admission pages and faculty pages for intake-specific postgraduate deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: For September starts, NL/EU/EFTA students apply in Studielink by 15 June and submit WU documents by 1 July; non-EU/non-EFTA students apply in Studielink by 15 April and submit documents by 1 May. Applications for September 2026 are closed; the page offers notification for September 2027 opening.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page gives exact deadlines and current September 2026 closed status, but not the exact September 2027 opening date.

cycleGuidance.opensText: International applicants for 2026/2027 must apply by 23:59 Friday 11 September 2026 UK time; UK applicants by 23:59 Wednesday 16 September 2026. January 2027 start applications open Monday 2 March 2026 and close 23:59 Monday 4 January 2027.
cycleGuidance.notes: The January opening and closing dates are central to January-start programmes; programme eligibility should be checked before creating a formal programme-specific window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official page links to UNIGE registration and important dates, but the accessible static text does not expose application opening or closing dates.
cycleGuidance.notes: Keep monitoring the UNIGE science listing and central master programme portal for a directly readable Computer Science master admissions page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The page provides application links for 2026 entry and states that applications for 2027 entry will open in September 2026.
cycleGuidance.notes: No Computer Science-specific deadline was captured from accessible official pages in this pass.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The accessible English application schedule page shows an old 2021 spring/fall sample schedule and instructs international applicants to check Office of International Affairs admission notices for current announcements.
cycleGuidance.notes: The programme route is reliable, but no current 2026/2027 application window was captured, so no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should contact the department/programme of interest for deadline dates and admissions procedures.
cycleGuidance.notes: The old CSE deep links currently resolve to a general department page in this environment, so no Computer Science-specific current window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The programme page includes an enrol link for the 2026-2027 Master of Science in Computer Science Engineering. Ghent's application page says complete files must be received by the application deadline.
cycleGuidance.notes: No exact opening or closing date was captured from accessible official pages in this pass.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official G30 graduate page lists English-taught graduate programmes with Master and Doctor routes.
cycleGuidance.notes: The central master's page points to the G30 graduate site, but this pass did not capture current date ranges for applications.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application period: Mid-October - Mid-January.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page provides month-level application-period guidance but no exact opening or closing dates, so no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official page links to Graduate Admissions and Apply Now, but no exact application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: No formal dated window is recorded until WashU exposes current CSE graduate deadline dates in a readable official page.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Hiver 2027: applications from 1 February 2026 to 1 September 2026. Automne 2027: applications possible from 1 August 2026. Hiver 2028: applications possible from 1 February 2027.
cycleGuidance.notes: The Hiver 2027 opening and closing dates are exact and recorded as a formal application window. Later intakes currently expose opening dates only in the captured text.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The course page has an Apply for this course link for September 2026 entry but does not expose an application deadline in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: No formal dated window is recorded because no closing date was captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants should complete supervisor contact at least six months before intended enrolment and then check the relevant graduate school's website for how to apply.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official central page is reliable route guidance, but no current Information Science and Technology window dates were captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The page links to ISEE master's admissions and includes 2026 notices about admission-process changes effective from AY 2027, but no exact current application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: No formal dated window is recorded until the current examination/application schedule is captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Fall 2026 application opens 1 September 2025; Spring 2027 application opens 1 February 2026. Specific deadline information is programme-specific in Degree Search.
cycleGuidance.notes: Engineering/SCAI programme pages returned 403 in this environment and the Degree Search Computer Science MS deep link did not resolve, so no Computer Science-specific formal window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Computer Science MSc typical deadline: international applicants 28 February; Canadian/permanent resident applicants 31 July.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page gives category-specific closing dates but no application opening dates or cycle year, so no formal dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central postgraduate catalogue confirms computing-related master's routes but does not expose exact application window dates in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: A direct DCC programme path tested in this pass returned 404, so the catalogue is recorded as reliable programme presence only.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official admissions centre exposes master's admissions and international-student routes but no exact current application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: The Computer Science department page connection reset in this environment, so programme-level dates were not recorded.

universities.school: Khalifa University of Science and Technology

cycleGuidance.opensText: The online application for admission is currently closed; applicants can create an account to receive notifications when the next intake opens.
cycleGuidance.notes: No exact next intake opening or closing date was captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants must submit the online application by the department/programme deadline; fee waiver requests should be submitted at least two weeks before the application deadline.
cycleGuidance.notes: Computer Science deep links tested in this pass returned 404, so no CS-specific dated window is recorded.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Online application portal opened 28 March 2026 and closed 28 April 2026 at 11:59 PM; the page currently states registration is closed.
cycleGuidance.notes: The exact 2026 application window is recorded as a formal verified window.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The page links to application key dates and deadlines but does not expose exact application opening or closing dates in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: No formal dated window is recorded until programme-specific intake dates are captured.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Applicants can apply directly to UOW and should check course entry requirements, intake dates, and closing dates before applying.
cycleGuidance.notes: The accessible course page confirms the programme and application route but does not expose exact intake opening or closing dates.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official computer school page confirms the graduate education route but does not expose exact current application opening or closing dates in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: The international admissions path tested in this pass returned 404, so this is recorded as programme-location evidence only.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The official Faculty of Informatics page lists master's programmes for the 2025/2026 and 2026/2027 cycles, but no exact application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: The central master's admissions URL tested in this pass returned 404.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The programme page confirms the master's route and the SIMAK UI portal confirms 2026/2027 admissions activity, but exact programme opening or closing dates were not captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: The application portal is recorded separately as the programme application URL.

cycleGuidance.entry: Computer Science and Engineering graduate programmes
cycleGuidance.opensText: The CSE page directs applicants to graduate admissions and the central programme search lists the MS route, but no exact current application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: Several CSE admissions deep links returned 404, so the stable graduate page and central programme search are retained.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central page explains how to apply to graduate programmes and links to the online application, but no exact institution-wide opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: Programme pages should be checked for individual admissions requirements and deadlines.

cycleGuidance.opensText: Application periods are 1 December to 15 January for summer semester, 1 May to 15 June for winter semester, and 15 February to 31 March for international master's programmes.
cycleGuidance.notes: The official page gives stable month/day periods rather than a single dated 2026/2027 record, so no formal exact-year window is recorded in applications.json.

cycleGuidance.opensText: For September admission, Reading recommends UK applicants apply by 1 August and international students requiring a visa apply by 1 July; programme-specific deadlines appear on course pages where applicable.
cycleGuidance.notes: The page states applications may still be considered after the recommended dates, so these are not recorded as formal closing windows.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central master's overview and programme list are accessible, but exact application opening or closing dates were not captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: Several guessed application-deadline URLs returned 404, so programme-specific pages should be checked in a later quality pass.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The International Admissions Office graduate page links to graduate programme categories, but no exact institution-wide application opening or closing dates were captured.
cycleGuidance.notes: The admissions homepage shows September 2026 entry application-guide news, but formal deadlines remain programme-specific.

cycleGuidance.opensText: The central admission page instructs applicants to note admission deadlines and identifies the Admissions Office as the first point of contact, but exact dated master's windows were not captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: The master programmes page confirms TU Wien master's study routes; a later pass should target the admission-deadlines subpage.

universities.school: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University

cycleGuidance.opensText: The OIA admissions folder confirms the international degree-seeking admissions route, but no exact current application opening or closing dates were captured in accessible text.
cycleGuidance.notes: Older guessed NYCU OIA short paths returned 404; the current OIA folder path is retained.
